description: Verso: Page from the court register (שימוש) of the Babylonian community of Fustat. Dated: Thursday, 27 Nisan 1339 = 25 April 1028 CE. Mubārak b. Hiba, a beadle of the Babylonian community in Fustat, declares that he had caught a man, Saqqā (סקא) on the last day of Passover (Friday יום ויושע) and confined him in his house. After a declaration of a ḥerem stam Yaʿaqov Levi b. Yosef testifies that he saw the imprisoned man escape through a window of the beadle’s house. Witnesses: Avraham b. Aharon ha-Kohen and Yosef b. ʿOvadya. Another court record from the same date is found in Bodl. MS heb. c 13/21r. (Information mainly from Goitein notes linked below.)
description_he: עמוד מפנקס בית דין בבלי בפוסטאט, 25 באפריל 1028, על כתר שנאסר ובריחתו מבית השמש
